'''Yusuf Aydin''' (born 13 September 2000) is a [[Turkey national rugby league team|Turkish international]] [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} for [[Hull FC]] in the [[Super League]].

He has previous spent time on loan from [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]] at [[Wakefield Trinity]] in the [[Super League]].

==Background==
Aydin was born in [[Wakefield]], [[West Yorkshire, England]] and is of Turkish heritage.

==Career==
===International===
Aydin is a [[Turkey national rugby league team|Turkish]] international.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.seriousaboutrl.com/meet-yusuf-aydin-wakefields-teenage-international-with-world-cup-dreams-31043/ |title=Meet Yusuf Aydin: Wakefield's teenage international with World Cup dreams |publisher=Serious About Rugby League |first=Jack |last=Conlon |date=3 July 2020}}</ref>

===Wakefield Trinity===
Aydin made his professional debut in round 12 of the [[Super League XXV results|2020 Super League season]] for [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield]] against [[Hull FC]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/54070113|title=Super League: Hull FC 26-23 Wakefield Trinity|publisher=BBC}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/hull-vs-wakefield/teams/54474 |title=Starting Lineups - Hull vs Wakefield |publisher=Sky Sports |date=10 September 2020}}</ref>

===Featherstone Rovers (loan)===
On 5 April 2023, it was reported that he would join [[Featherstone Rovers]] on a short-term loan deal.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/featherstone-rovers-bring-in-super-league-forward-on-loan|title=Featherstone Rovers bring in Super League duo on loan|publisher=Love Rugby League|accessdate=5 Apr 2023|date=5 Apr 2023}}</ref>

===Featherstone Rovers (DR)===
On 12 April 2024 it was reported that he had signed for Featherstone Rovers in the [[RFL Championship]] on DR loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=12 April 2024|title=Hull KR’s Ben Reynolds returns to Featherstone Rovers on dual-registration following Super League move|url=https://www.totalrl.com/hull-krs-ben-reynolds-returns-to-featherstone-rovers-on-dual-registration-following-super-league-move/}}</ref>

===Hull F.C. (loan)===
On 24 April 2024 it was reported that he had signed for [[Hull F.C.]] in the [[Super League]] on short-term loan<ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=24 Apr 2024|author=Callum Walker|title=Hull KR prop Yusuf Aydin makes short-term loan move to Super League rivals|url=https://www.totalrl.com/hull-kr-prop-yusuf-aydin-makes-short-term-loan-move-to-super-league-rivals/}}</ref>

===Hull F.C.===
On 8 May 2024 it was reported that he had signed for Hull F.C. in the Super League on a two-year deal, making the existing loan deal a permanent move, in a swap with [[Jack Brown (rugby league)|Jack Brown]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=8 May 2024|author=Drew Darbyshire|title=Hull FC and Hull KR forwards in swap deal as pair make permanent moves|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/hull-fc-and-hull-kr-forwards-in-swap-deal-as-pair-make-permanent-moves}}</ref>
